creator: ish@amail.plala.or.jp
text:
Created attachment 226150
info.7

I'm using 14.0-CURRENT n247629.
They are sometimes panics with 'Panic String: lookup: encountered unexpected nul; string [foo]'. foo are mail, video, sys, ...

% /sys/amd64/conf/SG_UDF2
include GENERIC
ident   SG_UDF2
device  sg

Files ware put on
https://www.ish.org/files/vmcore-n247629.[567].xz ,
https://www.ish.org/files/core-n247629.txt.[567].xz , and
https://www.ish.org/files/info-n247629.[567] .
